introSection: Bandidos is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Mer de Sable in Ermenonville, Hauts-de-France, France. It opened on 23 July 2016.
fullText:
Bandidos is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Mer de Sable in Ermenonville, Hauts-de-France, France. It opened on 23 July 2016.



Each row sits back-to-back.
